3125620.name: Deep Down Dinos
3125620.description:
Meteors fall from the sky, and monsters rise from the earth. To survive, dinosaurs begin their expedition in search of the legendary city said to exist deep within the Earth.

A Message for Dinosaurs Setting Out on the Expedition

  • Defeat enemies to collect Soul Stones and gain perks.

  • Each perk has one or more unique synergies. You can either pick only the rare, powerful perks or choose perks with synergies that fit the situation—it’s all up to you.

  • Soul Stones are a vital currency underground. Use them wisely for trading in shops, re-selecting perks, and more.

  • If the situation isn’t favorable, avoiding battles and choosing alternate paths is an option. But remember, to grow strong enough, you'll need to fight as many battles as possible.

  • You must reach the center of the Earth. The future of all dinosaurs is in your hands!
